title: Law No. 45 of 2006 Amending Legislative Decree No. 9 of 1984 Regarding the Central Population Registry
summary: Updates the competent authority framework for executive regulation of the Central Population Registry and remains relevant to national population and identity-data governance.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Amends Bahrain’s Central Population Registry legal framework.
theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: Amends the Central Population Registry framework.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Legislative Decree No. 9 of 1984
